zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wycliffe於從1436年1月10日到1437年1月9日出生在英國越可爾威克里夫時，他的父親John Wycliffe Esq.26歲，母親Agnes Rokeby19歲。他於大約1464年與Margery Conyers在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年10月1日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Wycliffe于从1436年1月10日到1437年1月9日出生在英国越可爾威克里夫时，他的父亲John Wycliffe Esq.26岁，母亲Agnes Rokeby19岁。他于大约1464年与Margery Conyers在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年10月1日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Wycliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wycliffe (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wycliffe was born from 10 January 1436 to 9 January 1437, in Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Wycliffe Esq., was 26 and his mother, Agnes Rokeby, was 19. He married Margery Conyers about 1464, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 October 1494, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wycliffe est né du 10 janvier 1436 au 9 janvier 1437, à Wycliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Wycliffe Esq., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rokeby, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margery Conyers environ 1464, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1494, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Wycliffe von 10. Januar 1436 bis 9. Januar 1437 in Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wycliffe Esq. 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Rokeby 19. Er hat um 1464 in Yorkshire, England Margery Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Oktober 1494 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wycliffe è nato il da 10 gennaio 1436 a 9 gennaio 1437 nel Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Wycliffe Esq., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Rokeby, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margery Conyers circa 1464, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 ottobre 1494, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wycliffeがから1436年1月10日まで1437年1月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウイクリフで生まれた時，父John Wycliffe Esq.は26歳，母Agnes Rokebyは19歳であった。約1464年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargery Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年10月1日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wycliffe(이)가 1436년 1월 10일부터 1437년 1월 9일까지 영국 요르크실르 윈이클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wycliffe Esq.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Rokeby(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1464년 영국 요르크실르에서 Margery Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 10월 1일 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wycliffe nasceu de 10 de janeiro de 1436 a 9 de janeiro de 1437, em Wycliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wycliffe Esq., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Rokeby, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Conyers aproximadamente 1464, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1494, em sua cidade natal.

ru.1436–1 October 1494: с 10 января 1436 по 9 января 1437–1 октября 1494 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wycliffe родился с 10 января 1436 по 9 января 1437 в местности виклифф, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wycliffe Esq. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rokeby, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Conyers около 1464 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 октября 1494 г. в его родном городе.
